mapper.select: SELECT destroyRequest.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO , destroyRequest.INSERT_USER_CD requestUserCd , docsUser.USER_NM AS requestUserNm , (SELECT COMPANY_CD FROM DOCS_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_CD = docsUser.COMPANY_CD) AS requestCompanyCd , (SELECT COMPANY_NM FROM DOCS_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_CD = docsUser.COMPANY_CD) AS requestCompanyNm , destroyRequest.BUSINESS_AREA_CD , FN_GET_CD_NM('businessAreaCd', destroyRequest.BUSINESS_AREA_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS businessAreaNm , destroyRequest.INSERT_DT requestDt , (SELECT detail.ORIGINAL_USER_CD FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_DETAIL detail WHERE detail.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = destroyRequest.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO AND APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL') AS purchaserUserCd , (SELECT detail.REQUEST_DESC FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_DETAIL detail WHERE detail.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = destroyRequest.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO AND APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST') AS requestDesc , (SELECT detail.REQUEST_DESC FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_DETAIL detail WHERE detail.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = destroyRequest.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO AND ACTION_CD = 'REJECT') AS rejectDesc , destroyRequest.Status_Cd AS statusCd FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyRequest INNER JOIN DOCS_USER docsUser ON destroyRequest.INSERT_USER_CD = docsUser.USER_CD WHERE destroyRequest.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = #{destroyRequestNo}

SELECT dm.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO , dm.REQUEST_NO , dm.OBJECT_ID , dm.FILE_NO , dm.BUSINESS_AREA_CD , FN_GET_CD_NM('businessAreaCd', dm.BUSINESS_AREA_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS businessAreaNm , rf.FILE_PATH_NM , rf.ORG_FILE_NM , rf.FILE_NM , rf.FILE_SIZE , rf.PRINT_COUNT , m.REV_NO , m.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CD_NM('distributeTypeCd', m.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS distributeTypeNm , m.PRODUCT_CD , COALESCE(m.PRODUCT_CD, '') AS PRODUCT_NM , m.CURRENT_PAGE_NO , m.TOTAL_PAGE_NO , m.ECN_NO , m.STD_GAPP_DT , m.CHANGE_GAPP_DT , m.SW_VERSION_NO , m.DOC_VERSION_NO , m.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CD_NM('businessTypeCd', m.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS businessTypeNm , m.OBJECT_NM , m.OBJECT_NO , r.OBJECT_TYPE FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_MAPPING dm INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING m ON dm.REQUEST_NO = m.REQUEST_NO AND dm.OBJECT_ID = m.OBJECT_ID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_FILE rf ON dm.REQUEST_NO = rf.REQUEST_NO AND dm.OBJECT_ID = rf.OBJECT_ID AND dm.FILE_NO = rf.FILE_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST r ON r.REQUEST_NO = m.REQUEST_NO WHERE dm.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = #{destroyRequestNo}

SELECT DESTROY_NO , DESTROY_FILE_SEQ , FILE_NM AS fileName FROM DOCS_DESTROY_FILE WHERE DESTROY_NO = ( SELECT CAST(DESTROY_NO AS TEXT) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST WHERE DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = #{destroyRequestNo} )
SELECT DESTROY_NO , DESTROY_FILE_SEQ , FILE_PATH_INSIDE AS FILE_PATH , FILE_NM AS fileName FROM DOCS_DESTROY_FILE WHERE DESTROY_NO = #{destroyNo} AND DESTROY_FILE_SEQ = #{destroyFileSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST SET STATUS_CD = CASE WHEN #{saveFlag} = 'A' THEN 'APPROVAL' ELSE 'REJECT' END , DESTROY_DT = CASE WHEN #{saveFlag} = 'A' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END , APPROVAL_DT = CASE WHEN #{saveFlag} = 'A' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END WHERE DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = #{destroyRequestNo}

UPDATE DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_DETAIL SET ACTION_CD = CASE WHEN #{saveFlag} = 'A' THEN 'APPROVAL' ELSE 'REJECT' END , REQUEST_DESC = CASE WHEN #{saveFlag} = 'A' THEN '' ELSE #{rejectDesc} END , ACTION_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = #{destroyRequestNo} AND APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL'

UPDATE DOCS_REQUEST_FILE SET DESTROY_STATUS_CD = CASE WHEN #{saveFlag} = 'A' THEN '3' ELSE '4' END /* 3:폐기승인, 4:폐기반려 */ WHERE (REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO) IN ( SELECT REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_MAPPING WHERE DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = #{destroyRequestNo} )

UPDATE DOCS_APPROVAL_FILE SET DESTROY_STATUS_CD = CASE WHEN #{saveFlag} = 'A' THEN '3' ELSE '' END /* 3:폐기승인 */ , DESTROY_DT = CASE WHEN #{saveFlag} = 'A' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END WHERE (REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO) IN ( SELECT REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_MAPPING WHERE DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = #{destroyRequestNo} )
